title: Dreaming of a Stamp: Approval and Cost
seoDescription: What does it mean to see a postage stamp or a seal stamp in a dream? Formality, approval, payment, journey, and value.
introduction: A stamp is a ticket of passage. To see or affix a stamp in a dream symbolizes **'The Formalization, Approval, and Payment of a Matter.'** A letter cannot be sent without a stamp; this conveys that there will be no result without effort or cost.
symbolism:
A stamp symbolizes completion and the eventual realization of things in our dreams. At various stages of life, approaching the end of a task and making the final touches emerges as a reflection of our spirit. The affixing of a stamp carries the excitement of reaching a goal and reaping the fruits of our efforts; it indicates that by completing a part of our soul, we prepare the ground for a new beginning.

A stamp collection is a treasure that brings together the precious memories of our lives. This collection is formed by the gathering of moments accumulated with patience and diligence; each stamp holds an experience, a feeling, or a memory from the past. Old stamps carry stories from the depths of time. They symbolize a historical legacy, a debt from the past, or a forgotten love. Through these symbols in our dreams, we explore the traces of the past and reshape our hopes for the future.
cosmicAnalysis:
This dream carries 4 different cosmic messages according to the phases of the Moon:

**🌑 New Moon:** A stamp heralds new beginnings and official approvals. At this phase, it is time to initiate a new job or project in your life; spiritually, you should embrace this transition and be open to new opportunities.

**🌓 Waxing Moon:** Affixing a stamp signifies the time to take action and make a step towards completing your goals. During this period, you must show the patience and determination needed to bring your plans to life; everything requires effort and reciprocity.

**🌕 Full Moon:** The full moon is a time of completion and illumination; a stamp reveals the value of your achievements and past efforts. At this phase, it is important to evaluate the results you have obtained and move forward with the wisdom they bring.

**🌗 Waning Moon:** This phase symbolizes debts from the past and old stamp collections. It is time to prepare for a new beginning by leaving behind burdens that need to be released and things belonging to the past; moving forward by learning from the lessons of the past opens the door to spiritual cleansing.
commonScenarios: Stamped stamp: Symbolizes that the task is finished and there is no turning back.
Torn stamp: Indicates an invalid transaction and wasted money.
Foreign stamp: Signifies a visitor coming from afar.
cta: The stamp dream is an approval. Download the Dream Boat app to send.
